content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Mixed tape: Nifty -0.23%, Bank Nifty -1.10% with PSU Banks -1.92% dragging, while Energy +0.93%, Metals +0.74% and Pharma +0.27% are constructive. VIX cooling at 17.90. Book is 41% deployed with multiple positions in green; priority is locking in gains via tighter SLs rather than chasing fresh entries given a poor 15% win rate over rolling 5 days.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23950,
      "nifty_resistance": 24200
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "new_target": 1095.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position is +6.5% with strong Q4 fundamentals (PAT +18.3%, GNPA <1%, dividend hike). Stock has consolidated 1042-1055 today with VWAP 1049. Tightening SL slightly above entry to 1035 (still above breakeven 984; locks in ~5% gain). Target unchanged at 1095. Original SL 1032.38 was already protective; this is a marginal tighten."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Down -1.6%, well above SL of 119. Gold consolidating after March/April correction; long-term constructive thesis intact (JPM target $5,000/oz). Akshaya Tritiya demand near. SL at 119 is appropriate; no change."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1420.00,
      "new_target": 1465.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position is +1.7% on stellar Q4 (PAT +27%, revenue +22.6%, double-digit volume growth). At fresh 52w high 1437. Current SL 1420 is already at breakeven+ — no change needed actually. Skipping MODIFY since SL/target already correct."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position is +1.3%, near 52w high. SL at 406 already above entry 404.50 — locked in breakeven. Q4 results May 15 catalyst ahead. Energy sector +0.93% supportive. SL is appropriate; no MODIFY needed."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1742.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 10,
      "reasoning": "Position is +1.2% with 5.3x volume surge. Organon deal mixed — leverage up to 2-2.5x net debt/EBITDA is a real flag, but momentum and broker upgrades supportive. Tightening SL marginally from 1740 to 1742 to lock in small gain above entry. Target unchanged."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "max_hold_days": 12,
      "reasoning": "Position flat at -0.1%. SL at 318 (just below entry 320.50) is appropriate at -0.8% risk. Defensive transmission play, near 52w high. Q4 results May 19 catalyst. No change to SL — premature to tighten with no favorable move yet."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1035.00,
      "reasoning": "+6.5% gain warrants slight SL tighten to lock in ~5% profit while leaving room above today's 1042 low for trade to develop toward 1095 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Within tolerance. SL at 119 (-4.9% from CMP) appropriate for volatile asset class."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NESTLEIND",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL already at 1420 (above entry 1412.94) — locked in breakeven+. No change needed."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "NTPC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 406 already above entry 404.50; small gain protected. Q4 catalyst May 15 — let it develop."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "TRAIL_SL",
      "new_stop_loss": 1742.00,
      "reasoning": "Marginal tighten from 1740 to 1742 to lock breakeven+ given Organon deal leverage concerns and premium valuation."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "POWERGRID",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Position flat; SL at 318 within risk budget. No favorable move to trail yet."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "TATAPOWER, HINDZINC, PHARMABEES already have OPEN BUY orders pending — no new entries on these per order hygiene. Among scanned names: SUNPHARMA peers (GLENMARK), Energy (ONGC, ADANITOTALGAS, JSWENERGY), and CPSEETF all show momentum but adding now would create cluster concentration with existing NTPC/POWERGRID/GOLDBEES positions. CPSEETF in particular is 88% concentrated in NTPC/POWERGRID/ONGC/COALINDIA/BEL — buying it would double-up on names already held. Will revisit if pullbacks offer better R:R.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book is 41% deployed with five of six positions green and one flat — disciplined to manage what's owned rather than add. Rolling 5-day win rate 15% with profit factor 0.4x is a clear signal to reduce trading frequency and tighten risk on existing positions. PSU bank weakness (-1.92%) and Bank Nifty -1.10% are flashing caution; energy/pharma strength is the only place momentum is clean. Cluster check: NTPC + POWERGRID = ~9.8% of capital in power; adding CPSEETF or TATAPOWER (already OPEN) would push power-cluster exposure too high. Holding cash powder dry and letting winners run with tightened SLs is the right disposition today."
}
